{{CargoRelic
|name=Silver Stag Vessel
|class_id=22038
|rank=Blue
|affct=ART
|birthday=08-06
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Aug 6, 1400 BC, the Silver Stag Vessel was forged by Hittite Craftsmen.<br>This vessel, in the form of a stag, has thousands of years of history and gracefully displays the naturalistic features of Hittite Art. The main part of the drinking vessel is made of a dozen pieces of silver, and a circle of patterns on the edge of the cup mouth appears to depict characters in some ceremony. It is speculated that they may be celebrating a successful hunt.
|fame=23
|art=44
|fth=31
|civ=29
|tech=27
|ss1=Demon Minion RUSH +1%
|ss2=Demon Minion RUSH +2%
|ss3=Demon Minion RUSH +3%
|ss4=Demon Minion RUSH +5%
|ss7=Demon Minion RUSH +5%<br>Demon Minion RUSH +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill I.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion HP +1.5%
}}
